description_long: This is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring large, cushioned ear cups that provide comfort and noise isolation. The headband is broad and smoothly contoured, likely padded for additional comfort during extended use. The exterior of the ear cups and headband is finished in matte black, with a subtle logo visible on the side of the headband. The ear cups appear to be made of synthetic leather or similar soft material, while the headband and outer shell are constructed from durable plastic. The headphones are designed to fully enclose the ears, enhancing audio immersion and reducing ambient noise. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for both casual and professional urban environments.
description: A sleek pair of over-ear wireless headphones with cushioned ear cups and a matte black finish, featuring a subtle logo on the headband.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the broad, padded headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the logo on the headband and the profile of the ear cup.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the symmetrical, oval-shaped ear cups and the inner padding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with the logo visible on the headband and the ear cup profile.
